title: Imperial quake scale
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Imperial quake scale''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] scale of measurement that was used to determine the strength of [[Groundquake/Legends|groundquakes]]. A measurement of 77.88 was considered to be a large quake.<ref name="MFMY">''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]''
